name: Ghoul Ghoul
original_name: ត្រកូលធ្មប់
overview: More than 200 years later, in Vientiane, there was a big sex scene. Waking up from a long slumber, warming the city, Chao Wiang Pha Chan has two wives, Mae Chao Thong On. who are pregnant and the mother Nai Klang, a foreign wife who tries however unable to get pregnant Waking came to Vientiane as the new mother teacher of the Holy Hall. Mae Nai Klang asks to use her mother's magic skills to conjure souls into the belly of the bangle. But there is a condition that at the age of 25 the child must become the heir of Wake. Golden Goddess After giving birth The child who came out with an ugly face was named Kampengthong, while the maternity bracelet on the same day and time was named Ring. Bangle decided to switch children in order to get his child out of the snare of the wake.

trailers.title: สุดยอดละครโทรทัศน์ไทยในสมัยรัชกาลที่ 9 ปี 2552 เรื่อง ปอปผีฟ้า
